name: ClawXGovernor
description: 工具治理 — 上下文工作集管理、工具风险分级与审计、会话级增量记忆，为 OpenClaw 补齐 Claude Code 的治理闭环。

recentTailTurns.description: Number of recent user turns to keep in the context window.

compactThresholdRatio.description: Token budget usage ratio that triggers compaction warning.

contextStateDir.description: Custom directory for context engine state files.

governorStateDir.description: Custom directory for tool governor audit/state files.

memoryStateDir.description: Custom directory for session memory note files.

summarizeThreshold.description: Character length threshold above which tool results are auto-summarized.

loopWindowSize.description: Number of recent tool calls to inspect for loop detection.

loopMaxRepeats.description: Max consecutive identical calls before loop is detected.

maxHintLines.description: Max lines of session memory hint injected into prompt.
